name: readme-reality-check
one_liner: A CLI that compares a repo's setup docs against its actual scripts, files, and runnable commands to catch stale onboarding instructions.
deliverables: sample HTML report on real repos
reasoning: GitHub issues and HN both point to onboarding and documentation drift as a persistent pain point, while agent-heavy repos make setup even harder. A lightweight local auditor is broadly useful, keyless, and very buildable in one session.
